title: Cyclo Intelligence: Physical AI Workflow System for ROBOTIS Robots
summary: Cyclo Intelligence is a Physical AI workflow platform developed by ROBOTIS that provides an integrated web UI for robot dataset collection, dataset management, LeRobot-format conversion, and trained-model deployment. The system comprises two main components: Cyclo Data for dataset pipeline management and Cyclo Brain for policy runtime and robot inference. It is compatible with ROBOTIS OMY, OMX, AI Worker, and any ROS 2-enabled robot, and supports simulation environments including Gazebo and Isaac Sim/Lab.
